title: “Annemarie Schimmel Symposium 2021” in Memory of Meşkure Sargut
content:
“Annemarie Schimmel Symposium 2021” in Memory of Meşkure Sargut

“Annemarie Schimmel Symposium 2021” in Memory of Meşkure Sargut

13 February 2021

Üsküdar University Institute for Sufi Studies and Kerim Foundation organize a program every year under the title “In Memory of Meşkure Sargut” to commemorate important figures who have contributed to Sufi culture and literature. In 2021, “Annemarie Schimmel Symposium” was held on February 13th, 2021. The program was broadcasted on the Youtube Channels of Üsküdar University Institute for Sufi Studies and Kerim Foundation.

Program

Video Recordings:

Part I:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sWhaYnXUiNc

Part II:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qicBDi4keVA

For Professor Carl Ernst’s speech in English, please chect out 12:09.

Part III:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SG94Y_ufvZE

For Dr. Tanvir Anjum’s speech in English, please check out 29:31.

For Professor James Morris’s speech, please check out 51:10.
